hints.mirrorMode: When enabled, the model will be mirrored horizontally.
hints.mouseMirror: When enabled, the mouse will mirror the hand movement.
hints.ignoreMouse: When enabled, the model will not respond to mouse events. Useful for keyboard mode or gamepad mode.
hints.motionSound: When enabled, the model will play corresponding sound effects when performing actions (if they exist).
hints.behavior: When enabled, motions and expressions can be configured and triggered.
hints.typingExpression: When enabled, typing randomly triggers a motion or expression from the selected group after a random delay within this range.
hints.passThrough: When enabled, cat window interaction is locked and mouse input passes to apps underneath.
hints.alwaysOnTop: When enabled, the window stays above all other windows.
hints.returnToScreen: Moves the pet window to the visible area of the screen containing the pointer.
hints.windowSize: Use the slider for quick resizing, or enter a percentage for precise control.
hints.autoReleaseDelay: On Windows, some system keys cannot capture release events and will auto-release after timeout.
hints.hideOnHover: When enabled, the window hides automatically on mouse hover. You can set a delay; 0 means hide immediately.
hints.maxFPS: Limit the maximum frame rate for model rendering. Lowering the frame rate can reduce CPU/GPU usage.

hints.showTaskbarIcon: When enabled, the window can be captured via OBS Studio.
hints.showTrayIcon: When enabled, the app icon is displayed in the system tray.
hints.inputMonitoringPermission: Enable input monitoring to receive keyboard and mouse events from the system.
hints.inputMonitoringPermissionGuide:
Input Monitoring permission is required for the app to receive keyboard and mouse events from the system.

Steps:
1. Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Input Monitoring.
2. If MochiPaw already appears in the list, select it and click the "-" button to remove it.
3. Click the "+" button to find and add MochiPaw.
4. Restart the app for the permission to take effect.
hints.administratorPermission: Running the app as administrator helps capture some system-level keys and input events more reliably.
hints.administratorPermissionGuide:
To capture some system-level keys and input events more reliably, it is recommended to run the app as administrator.

How to do it:
1. Exit the app first.
2. Find the app exe or its shortcut in File Explorer.
3. Choose how to launch:
   • One-time: Right-click and choose "Run as administrator".
   • Always (default): Right-click → Properties → Compatibility tab → check "Run this program as an administrator" → OK.
hints.administratorRelaunchFailed: Unable to restart as administrator. Please right-click the app and choose "Run as administrator".

hints.deleteModel: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
hints.clickOrDragToImport: Click or drag here to import

controlledImport.title: Controlled packages cannot be imported here
controlledImport.content: Detected controlled package {packageId}. Please use the dedicated controlled import flow.

hints.toggleCat: Toggle the visibility of the cat window.
hints.togglePreferences: Toggle the visibility of the preferences window.
hints.passThrough: Toggle whether cat window interaction is locked.
hints.alwaysOnTop: Toggle whether the cat window stays on top.

hints.appInfo: Copy app information and provide it to bug issue.
hints.authorInfo: Project authors, contributors, community group, and original project source.
hints.debugMonitor: Refreshes the current app process CPU, memory, and related usage every second. CPU shows -- on the first sample.
hints.resourceMetrics: Shows each model resource's file size and estimated decoded memory. Textures are estimated as RGBA by actual image size; other resources use file size.
hints.compactMemorySuccess: Current process memory has been compacted

hints.notFound: Model master configuration file not found, please ensure the model files are complete.
